notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Mitch Keller picks off Daylen Lile at 2nd on throw to second baseman Brandon Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead pops out to third baseman Nick Gonzales in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Curtis Mead. Jake Mangum to 3rd. Konnor Griffin to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Curtis Mead.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Nationals challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: José Tena singles on a line drive to left fielder Jake Mangum. CJ Abrams out at home on the throw, left fielder Jake Mangum to catcher Joey Bart.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead flies out to right fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.
